title: Sondiko Butane Torch, Waterproof and Wind-Resistant Industrial Torch, Refillable Power Soldering Torch, Adjustable Flame Torch Lighter for Metal Welding, Baking Outdoor (Butane Gas Not Included)
features: Safe Kitchen Blow Torch: Adopt light up with Piezo lgnition technology, one touch piezo ignition, spout surrounded by porcelain structure for quick light up and cooling. With Long angled nozzle designed keep your hand safely away from the flame.

Flame Adjustable: Adjustable flame size and shape, temperature can reach up to 1300 c/2500 F to meet various needs, you can choose the different flame according to your need (Soft fire or Spit fire). 360 Degree Reverse Use: This Butane gas torch can 360 Degree Reverse Use, can be used at any angle after 2 minutes of warm-up period.(Butane Gas Not Included)
360 Degree Reverse Use: This Butane gas torch can 360 Degree Reverse Use, can be used at any angle after 2 minutes of warm-up period.(Butane Gas Not Included)
Wide Use: This blow torch is widely used in the processing of delicious caramel desserts, meat ,lighting your fireplace, candles, barbecuing or camping or as a survival tool, easy to carry and use

NOTE: Compatible with any butane gas cylinder with SHORT nozzle. Our Butane Torch Head is backed by superior quality , please feel free to contact us for replacement or refunds if there are any issues with your purchase.
